prs.title: Downgrade dotenv to v16.4.5 to resolve peer dependency conflict
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line package.json change to downgrade a dependency version — purely trivial config tweak.

prs.title: Add Company File Attachments Feature
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major feature adding S3-backed file attachments with schema changes, server actions, UI components, deployment config updates, and documentation across 13 custom files.

prs.title: Add Company Snapshot Feature
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant feature introducing company snapshots with new Prisma schema, seed data, multiple layout integrations, admin toggle, utility libs, and a full client-side snapshot UI.

prs.title: Staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted change of 15 lines in a single action file, with Jason's commits primarily being merges and branch integrations rather than novel logic.

prs.title: seeds default gaps if no existing gaps
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 15-line addition to seed default gaps when none exist — a small conditional logic change in a single action file.

prs.title: Reorganize field definitions and add automated deployment
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Meaningful reorganization of field definitions combined with a new automated deployment script, CI/CD config, and FieldCard component updates across 5 files with 438 custom lines.

prs.title: SM-142, SM-144 - icp profile short, multiple industry slides
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Modest feature work across 77 custom lines touching ICP profile collectors, field definitions, and two slide components for multi-industry support.

prs.title: SM-136 - Ch/gap analysis
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Small-medium addition of gap analysis assessors and utility improvements across 6 files with 69 custom lines, with Chris authoring nearly all substantive logic.

prs.title: �� Major Feature Release: AI Chat Agent System & Gap Analysis Platform
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Transformative epic introducing an entire LangGraph-based chat agent system, full gap analysis platform with dozens of AI assessors, component restructuring, and auth fixes across 144 files and 10,561 lines.

prs.title: updates account creation screens
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: UI refresh of multiple onboarding screen components with 177 lines of changes across 6 files — a modest but cohesive UI update.

prs.title: field definitions
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 41-line addition to a single field definitions file — a small data/schema content update.

prs.title: Fix PostgreSQL SSL certificate error in chat agent
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-file, 3-line fix to add SSL certificate handling for PostgreSQL connection in the chat agent.

prs.title: Fix chat scroll behavior
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small bug fix addressing chat scroll behavior across 3 files with 14 lines of targeted CSS and component adjustments.

prs.title: Upgrade LangChain to v1.0 stable
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial dependency version bump in package.json with only 5 custom lines of actual change.

prs.title: Fix progress bar display on readiness page
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small-medium fix touching 7 files with 80 custom lines to correct progress bar display, also introducing a chat agent page and chat panel component adjustments.

prs.title: feat: Multi-Agent Chat System with LangGraph
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 4582 custom lines across 24 files introducing a full multi-agent chat system with LangGraph, sub-agents, new API routes, UI components, and extensive documentation represents a transformative, weeks-long architectural addition to the platform.

stories.name: AI Chat Agent & Gap Analysis Platform Launch
stories.rationale: Delivered the core multi-agent chat system with LangGraph and gap analysis capabilities, including infrastructure fixes for SSL and LangChain upgrade needed to support the stable release.

stories.name: Gap Analysis Intelligence & ICP Profile Enhancements
stories.rationale: Extended the gap analysis agent with channel/gap analysis logic, improved ICP profile slides with short-form and multi-industry support, and added default gap seeding to ensure reliable baseline data.

stories.name: Company Document & Snapshot Management
stories.rationale: Enabled businesses to attach files and capture point-in-time snapshots of company data, providing richer context for AI-driven readiness assessments.

stories.name: Automated Deployment Pipeline & Field Structure
stories.rationale: Reorganized field definitions for consistency and introduced automated deployment workflows to streamline release operations.

stories.name: Account Creation & Onboarding UI Improvements
stories.rationale: Refreshed the account creation screens to improve the new user onboarding experience.

stories.name: Chat & Readiness UI Polish
stories.rationale: Fixed chat scroll behavior and progress bar display on the readiness page to deliver a smoother, more polished user experience.

stories.name: Staging Environment Stabilization
stories.rationale: Applied staging-specific configuration changes to ensure the pre-production environment reflects the latest platform updates.

stories.name: Dependency & Environment Hygiene
stories.rationale: Resolved a peer dependency conflict by downgrading dotenv, ensuring a clean and stable local and CI dependency tree.
